name: Orange Gin Fizz
instructions: Shake the gin, Cointreau, and orange juice with ice. Strain into a glass over fresh ice and top with the tonic water.

name: Lemon Cadillac Margarita
instructions: Shake everything except the Grand Marnier with ice. Strain into a chilled glass and gently pour the Grand Marnier over the back of a spoon to create the float.

name: Rhubarb & Rose Cocktail
instructions: Muddle the diced strawberries in a Collins glass. Add the gin and the rhubarb & rose syrup. Stir to combine. Add ice and top with soda water. Garnish with rose petals and rhubarb ribbons.
notes: We made it once with regular Empress gin and regular syrup with rose petals in it. Still pretty good.

name: The Plum Citrus Spark
instructions: Shake with ice and strain into a chilled glass. This creates a rounded, fruity drink where the tartness cuts the sweetness.
notes: Great with Japanese curry and Hua's mushrooms & Taiwan cabbage miso soup!
